keys.meta_description: Расходы, eInvoice и закрытие как связанные рабочие процессы с видимыми согласованиями для аудиторов.
keys.hero_title: Finance that follows the invoice-to-ledger thread
keys.hero_description: Run expense, eInvoice, and close as connected workflows—Scheduler and Automation handle the mechanical steps while approvals stay visible for auditors and leadership.
